title: ProSport Ventures Solutions is Hiring: Floor Manager (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: ProSport Ventures Solutions is Hiring: Floor Manager (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with ProSport Ventures Solutions! We are hiring a Floor Manager for our Jodhpur team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About ProSport Ventures Solutions:
ProSport Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Learning & development budget
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Jodhpur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ProSport Ventures Solutions!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
